description_long: This object is a rectangular box with a predominantly purple and white color scheme, featuring the brand name 'MERIDION' in large, bold letters on the front and top faces. The packaging displays images of round, filled cookies or pastries, suggesting the contents are edible, possibly a regional specialty. The box includes additional text in Spanish, such as 'Sabores Regionales' and '100% Argentinos,' and highlights the flavor with a picture of a fruit, likely quince. The sides of the box provide further product information, including a barcode, nutritional details, and a best-before date. The material appears to be glossy cardboard, giving the box a smooth and slightly reflective finish. The overall design is clean and professional, with clear branding and product imagery.
description: A rectangular, purple and white box labeled 'MERIDION,' featuring images of filled cookies and clear branding. The packaging is made of glossy cardboard with detailed product information and vibrant visuals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'MERIDION' brand name, product images, and flavor details prominently.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the end of the box with a best-before date and partial product imagery.
description_view_2: Back view featuring additional product images, promotional text, and more detailed information.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a barcode, nutritional information, and smaller text details.
attribute_label_text: MERIDION SABORES REGIONALES 100% ARGENTINOS ¡PROBA NUESTROS SABORES! MERIDION Sabores Regionales
